title: Codex CLI/direct-protocol to Desktop visibility coherence proof
user_task: Given one known Codex thread, classify whether CLI/direct-protocol/app-server evidence is also visible in Codex Desktop within a bounded observation or refresh window.
expected_public_safe_evidence: read-only app-server status and thread source coverage
visible Codex map source coverage and ambiguity markers
loo_codex_desktop_coherence state: cli_visible, desktop_visible, desktop_refresh_required, desktop_restart_required, or unknown
fallback routing note to #308 when Desktop visibility is not proven
public-safe scan with zero raw transcript, screenshot, token, cookie, and path leaks
proof_boundary: Proves only public-safe classification of Codex CLI/direct-protocol/app-server evidence against Codex Desktop visible metadata. It does not prove Codex GUI mutation, prompt typing, clicking, arbitrary desktop control, or unattended visible collaboration.
next_action: If the scenario reports cli_visible without desktop_visible, route #308 CUA/Peekaboo fallback proof before claiming Desktop-visible collaboration.
